# Reasoning field logged on every VLM decision

`REQ-reasoning-logged`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| requirement | draft |

Every JSON command returned by the VLM shall include a non-empty `reasoning` field. The planner shall log this field verbatim to the decisions.jsonl audit trail on every planning cycle, along with the triggering event and the resulting command.

**Rationale.** Post-flight analysis and failure diagnosis depend on knowing what the model was thinking at each decision point.

**Fit criterion.** `decisions.jsonl contains one entry per cycle; each entry has reasoning, command, trigger, and timestamp fields.`

**Verification method:** inspection · **priority:** shall · **verification status:** passing
